properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1 v6 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He has risen, He has risen, He has risen, Jesus is alive

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the life flowed from His body Seemed like Jesus' mission failed, But His sacrifice accomplished Vict'ry over sin and hell

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the grave God did not leave Him For His body to decay Raised to life - the Great Awakening Satan's pow'r He overcame

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If there were no resurrection, We ourselves could not be raised; But the son of God is living So our hope is not in vain

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When the Lord rides out of heaven, Mighty angels at His side, They will sound the final trumpet From the grave we shall arise

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Has given life immortal, We shall see Him face to face; Through eternity we'll praise Him, Christ the champion of our faith.
